text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon comes to my office one day with a
hand on her forehead...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Groan... Um, Trainer... Can you tell me that I'm cute?
choice_data_list: What's this all of a sudden?
What's this all of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
My head hurts... I got some rest and took some
medicine, but...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Nothing worked at all! So there's only one thing
left to try—the "cutie cure"!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You know how plants grow better when people
talk to them? I thought that if you told me I'm
cute...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I'd be so happy that my headache just
disappears! Sooo... Please?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, yaaay! ☆ And as for my headache...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: It hasn't improved at all! Waaaahhhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spend the rest of the day trying to cheer up
Smart Falcon, but her headache doesn't subside.
